description: Using the Splunk Enterprise web interface, create an interactive Classic Dashboard named 'Security_Investigation_Workbook' to help analysts investigate suspicious IPs. Log in to Splunk at http://localhost:8000 using username 'admin' and password 'SplunkAdmin1!'. The dashboard must include a time range picker and a text input for the target IP address using the token 'target_ip' (default '*'). It must feature at least three visualization panels querying the 'security_logs' and/or 'web_logs' indexes. All panel queries must use token substitution (e.g., $target_ip$) to dynamically filter results based on the text input.
